project_common.art_style: 8-bit pixel art, retro minimalist aesthetic inspired by Google Chrome offline game
project_common.rendering: pixel perfect rendering with no anti-aliasing

shared_attributes.style: 8-bit pixel art with sharp, dangerous silhouette
shared_attributes.shading: flat color, no gradients or shading
shared_attributes.movement: scrolls left at current game speed

context.role: Ground obstacle requiring precise jump timing, tallest cactus variant
context.screen_position: Spawns at x=650px (screen_width + 50), y=0px (ground level), scrolls left
context.usage_scenario: Challenging obstacle appearing after score 200+, requires higher/more precise jump as height (100px) exceeds player max jump height (90px)

visual_specification.shape: Three vertical cacti in a group with varying heights, tallest in center or varied arrangement
visual_specification.texture: solid pixel art, no texture patterns
visual_specification.details: Three cacti with slight spacing, varying heights creating irregular top silhouette, maximum height 100px, horizontal spikes on each cactus, widest and tallest obstacle variant

relationships.shared_with: Same color and style as cactus_small and cactus_medium
relationships.differences_from: cactus_small is 34x70px (single), cactus_medium is 68x70px (double), cactus_large is 102x100px (triple and 30px taller)

explicit_negations: No flowers, fruits, or decorative elements
Not uniform height - cacti should have varied heights within 100px max
Not merged into single cactus - must show three distinct cacti
